title: Statistics and Data Science Minor Dissertation
outline: On successful completion of the coursework component, students will undertake an individual, supervised research project on a suitable topic, the results of which are to be written up as a minor dissertation. The minor dissertation component of the Statistics and Data Science masters specialisation is a research project based on selected research in a methodological or applied field of Statistics or Data Science.
assessment: The minor dissertation must be presented for formal examination. The coursework and minor dissertation each count 50% towards the degree; each must be passed separately for the award of the degree.
